name: Opal
summary: Opal is a no-code AI tool that allows users to create and share multi-step mini-apps using natural language instructions.
whyItMatters: Opal lowers the barrier to software creation by turning intent into executable logic. It signals Google’s exploration of AI-native app building where users define behavior instead of writing code.
likelyEvolution: May evolve into a lightweight app builder integrated with Workspace or Google AI platforms.
